summary: Comprehensive testing of Proof Fabric Protocol (PFP) API and frontend completed successfully. All backend endpoints working correctly with proper authentication, FEA generation, verification, and idempotency. Frontend UI functional with dark theme, tab navigation, and API integration.
passed_tests: Config endpoint returns test API key (/api/config)
FEA generation with valid payload and API key
FEA generation idempotency - same key + same payload returns same FEA
FEA generation idempotency conflict - same key + different payload rejected with 409
FEA verification with valid payload and signature
FEA verification with invalid signature returns false
Public verification by FEA ID returns correct data
Public verification for non-existent FEA returns 404
API key authentication - missing key returns 401
Frontend loads with dark theme correctly
Frontend Generate FEA tab visible and functional
Frontend Verify FEA tab visible and clickable
Frontend Public Verify tab visible and clickable
Frontend form fields all present and functional
Frontend API integration working - successful FEA generation
